description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directories (node_modules/ and /usr/local/lib/node_modules/). Define two stages, test and pages. In the test stage add a test job that runs `yarn install`, `yarn lint`, and `yarn test`, and saves the generated coverage directory as an artifact. In the pages stage add a pages job that depends on the test job, runs `mkdir public/` and `mv coverage/ public/coverage/`, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
